hero.title: India's Local Businesses. One Powerful Platform.
hero.subheading: Join Dendo as a Vendor or Delivery Partner and become part of a growing network that connects local businesses, delivery professionals, and customers across India.

about.title: Empowering Every Neighborhood Business
about.paragraph1: Dendo is India's hyperlocal delivery platform built to help local restaurants, grocery stores, pharmacies, and retail shops grow digitally. We connect businesses with customers through fast, reliable, and technology-driven delivery solutions.
about.paragraph2: Our goal is simple: help local businesses increase sales, help delivery partners earn more, and make everyday shopping easier for customers.
about.point1: Fast onboarding with zero setup fees

services.title: Everything You Need, Delivered Locally
services.intro: Dendo offers a complete hyperlocal delivery ecosystem designed to connect customers with local businesses and essential services in their city.

food.title: Food Delivery
food.description: Order from your favorite restaurants and enjoy fast, reliable delivery right to your doorstep.

grocery.title: Grocery Delivery
grocery.description: Get fresh fruits, vegetables, daily essentials, and household products delivered conveniently from nearby stores.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Delivery
ecommerce.description: Shop from local businesses and online sellers with seamless last-mile delivery powered by Dendo.

parcel.title: Parcel Delivery
parcel.description: Send documents, packages, gifts, and important items quickly and securely within your city.

howItWorks.title: Getting Started Is Simple
howItWorks.intro: Three easy steps to get food, groceries, and essentials delivered to your door.

step1.title: Browse
step1.description: Explore nearby restaurants and stores on the Dendo app and pick what you need.

step2.title: Order
step2.description: Place your order in a few taps and pay securely through the app.

step3.title: Delivered
step3.description: Track your order in real time as a Dendo partner brings it straight to your door.

joinUs.title: Become Part of the Dendo Family
joinUs.intro: Whether you want to deliver on your own schedule or grow your shop online, Dendo gives you the tools to get started today.

rider.title: Become a Dendo Rider
rider.description: Deliver orders on your own schedule and earn through daily and weekly bonuses, with no uniform required.

vendor.title: Register your Shop on Dendo
vendor.description: List your restaurant or shop on Dendo with free registration, no commission charges, and free menu listing.

user.name: Dendo User App
user.description: Browse restaurants, order food, track deliveries, and enjoy a seamless food ordering experience.

vendor.name: Dendo Vendor App
vendor.description: Manage menus, receive orders, monitor sales, and grow your restaurant business.

rider.name: Dendo Rider App
rider.description: Accept delivery requests, manage deliveries, and track earnings.

registerChoice.title: How would you like to partner with Dendo?
registerChoice.subtitle: Choose an option below to start your registration.

rider.title: Become a Dendo Rider
rider.description: Deliver orders on your own schedule and earn through daily and weekly bonuses, with no uniform required.

vendor.title: Register your Shop on Dendo
vendor.description: List your restaurant or shop on Dendo with free registration, no commission charges, and free menu listing.

intro.paragraph1: Dendo is an emerging food delivery startup focused on connecting customers, restaurants, and delivery partners through a simple, reliable, and technology-driven platform. Our goal is to support local businesses, create earning opportunities for riders, and provide customers with a fast and convenient food ordering experience.
intro.paragraph2: Through the Dendo ecosystem, users can discover restaurants, place orders, and track deliveries in real time. Vendors can efficiently manage their menus, orders, and business operations, while riders can earn by delivering orders through the Dendo Rider App.
intro.paragraph3: Dendo is committed to building a strong local delivery network and delivering quality service to customers while helping businesses grow in the digital marketplace.
intro.closingThanks: Thank you for your interest in joining Dendo. Together, we are building the future of local food delivery.
